# binarystruct

An automatic type-converting binary data marshaller/unmarshaller for Go structs and single values. Optimized for high-performance binary coding and decoding like network protocol packet handling.

## Core APIs
- [Marshal](marshal.go) — Encodes a struct or value into a binary stream.
- [Unmarshal](unmarshal.go) — Decodes a binary stream back into Go variables.
- [Inspect](struct.go) — Inspects structural byte offsets, sizes, and formats.

## Documentation Index
- [Full LLM Integration Guide](llms-full.txt) — Comprehensive coding rules, dynamic sizing, multidimensional arrays, computed/derived fields (lengths, counts, and custom checksums/CRCs via `valueof`), custom codecs, text encodings, and validation instructions.
- [Struct Tag Reference](STRUCT_TAGS.md) — Detailed guide on binary struct tag syntax, options, and endianness overrides.
- [Technical Specification](SPECIFICATION.md) — Ground-truth specification for runtime interpreter mechanics and compiler behavior.
- [Static Code Generator (binarystruct-codegen)](binarystruct-codegen/README.md) — Standalone CLI tool details to compile tags into static, zero-allocation Go methods.
- [Migration Guide (→ v0.3.0)](MIGRATION.md) — Upgrade path from 0.2.x: the Marshaler/Codec renames, struct-declared byte order, and the order-free API.

## Workspace (modules)

This repo is a Go workspace of **two independently-published modules** — consumers `go get`/`go install` the one they need (each resolves on its own `go.mod`). This module (`.`) is the primary one; the entry above is its manual. The map:

| Module | Path | Type | Manual | Agent-ready |
| :-- | :-- | :-- | :-- | :-- |
| `github.com/mixcode/binarystruct` | [`.`](.) | library (primary) | this file + [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt) | ✅ ready |
| `github.com/mixcode/binarystruct/binarystruct-codegen` | [`binarystruct-codegen/`](binarystruct-codegen/) | CLI (code generator) | [llms.txt](binarystruct-codegen/llms.txt) + [llms-full.txt](binarystruct-codegen/llms-full.txt) | ✅ ready |

**Working in this workspace**
- Workspace manager: `go.work` (root module `.` + `./binarystruct-codegen`).
- Test one module: `go test ./...` (root) / `cd binarystruct-codegen && go test ./...`. Full matrix incl. the safe path + codegen module: `make test`.
- Install the codegen CLI: `go install github.com/mixcode/binarystruct/binarystruct-codegen@latest` (pin a release with the path-prefixed tag `@binarystruct-codegen/vX.Y.Z`).
- Ground truth / repo-wide rules: [SPECIFICATION.md](SPECIFICATION.md) and [AGENTS.txt](AGENTS.txt) (the "three parallel paths must stay byte-identical" invariant + extension checklist).
- Build-from-root trap: none — each module builds standalone; `binarystruct-codegen` is a separate `go.mod` (not covered by the root module, no `replace`), so pin **its own** tag when installing a release.
